summary: Comprehensive testing of Artha - verified student network app. All 23 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests passed for all major flows: Login (Student/Vendor/Admin tabs), Admin dashboard/vendors/offers/domains/transactions, Vendor portal with QR scanner, Student dashboard with vendor search/filter, vendor detail, QR generation with 30-sec countdown.

issues: Vendor card images not loading (showing gray placeholder) - images are from Unsplash and may have loading delays

critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with proper separation of concerns
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
Auth flow properly handles session tokens and JWT
QR expiry (30 seconds) is correctly implemented
Role-based access control is properly enforced

test_credentials.other_vendors: campusbites@vendor.artha.com, freshprints@vendor.artha.com, cleanwavelaundry@vendor.artha.com, fitzonegym@vendor.artha.com (all use vendor123)
test_credentials.student: Created via MongoDB session - see auth_testing.md playbook

seed_data_creation: Seeded data includes: 5 vendors (The Brew Room, Campus Bites, Fresh Prints, CleanWave Laundry, FitZone Gym), 5 offers (15% each), 1 admin user, 2 allowed domains (bmsit.in, rvce.edu.in)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working correctly. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_artha_api.py cover: health check, admin/vendor auth, admin CRUD for vendors/offers/domains, vendor dashboard, student flows, full QR generation and validation flow. For student testing, create test user and session in MongoDB using the playbook in /app/auth_testing.md. The QR flow requires both student token (to generate) and vendor token (to validate).

features_tested.login_page: PASS - Student/Vendor/Admin tabs working, Google OAuth button for students, email/password for vendor/admin
features_tested.admin_dashboard: PASS - Shows stats (5 vendors, 5 offers, transactions)
features_tested.admin_vendors: PASS - Lists 5 seeded vendors with CRUD operations
features_tested.admin_offers: PASS - Lists 5 seeded offers with CRUD operations
features_tested.admin_domains: PASS - Shows bmsit.in and rvce.edu.in, add/delete working
features_tested.vendor_dashboard: PASS - Shows stats (scans, unique users, offers)
features_tested.vendor_scan: PASS - Camera button and manual entry options available
features_tested.student_dashboard: PASS - Shows 5 vendors with search and category filters
features_tested.vendor_detail: PASS - Shows vendor info and active offers with Get Discount button
features_tested.qr_validation: PASS - Vendor can validate QR via manual entry (tested via API)
features_tested.transaction_history: PASS - Student history page loads correctly
